name: Don't Shit On My #!$@& Roof
short_description: Pigeons are plotting to ruin your roof - it's time to fight back in Don't Shit On My #!$@& Roof! Battle through bosses, collect powerful artifacts, and outwit the pigeon horde in this hilarious 2D roguelite pixel art game.
detailed_description:
Defend Your Roof Against the Pigeon Army!

Get ready to defend your roof against an army of pigeons in Don't Shit On My #!$@& Roof! This rogue-lite survival game is packed with humor, non-stop action, and pigeon-slaying fun.
"Put the pigeons in their place and protect your roof like a boss!"


Choose Your Starting Deity and Build Your Equipment

With over 250 different items to collect and use, you'll have plenty of opportunities to customize your play style. Choose your starting deity and level up to choose new artifacts for your equipment and your house. The choices you make will determine your success in this endless battle against the pigeons.
"Destroy the pigeons with divine power"

Twitch Integration: Pacify Your Viewers...

Streaming on Twitch? Get ready to have even more fun with the Twitch integration! The pigeons in the game will take on the name of your active viewers in the chat, and you can use your weapons to "pacify" them.
"Stream and slay, it's a beautiful thing!"


Survive the Pigeon Hordes on Multiple Maps

With several different maps available, each with unique challenges, you'll never get bored of defending your roof. Take on the pigeons in new and exciting ways and see if you can survive for 20 minutes. And with several levels of difficulty and an endless game mode, there's something for everyone.
"Different map, same pigeon problem."

Kill Pigeons with Style

In Don't Shit On My #!$@& Roof, it's not just about surviving, it's about doing so with style. Choose your weapons and take down the pigeons in a way that suits you. And with objectives to accomplish and new items to unlock, you'll always have something new to strive for.
"Pigeons beware, I have style... And weapons!"
